quinn-pr-history.description: Embedded PR diff chunks with review decisions and metadata

metadata_fields.file: string — relative file path in the repo
metadata_fields.pr_url: string — full URL to the PR on GitHub
metadata_fields.chunk_index: integer — zero-based index of this chunk within the file
metadata_fields.line_start: integer — first line number of the chunk in the original file
metadata_fields.line_end: integer — last line number of the chunk in the original file
metadata_fields.review_issues: string — comma-separated summary of issues flagged in review

quinn-code-patterns.description: Embedded symbol definitions and surrounding context from indexed repositories

metadata_fields.file: string — relative file path in the repo
metadata_fields.symbol_name: string — name of the function, class, or export
metadata_fields.symbol_type: string — function | class | interface | export | method
metadata_fields.line: integer — line number where the symbol is defined
metadata_fields.context: string — symbol definition plus surrounding lines

quinn-review-learnings.description: Dismissed Quinn comment patterns to avoid repeating low-signal feedback

metadata_fields.dismissed_count: integer — number of times this pattern was dismissed
metadata_fields.approval_count: integer — number of times this pattern was acted upon
metadata_fields.most_recent_reason: string — last developer-provided reason for dismissal
metadata_fields.last_updated: string — ISO 8601 timestamp of most recent update
